name: aintercom
description: Production Régie Platform - Unified Dashboard for Live Events
author: Morgan Spirli <morgan@aintercom.dev>

scripts.deploy: git push origin main && echo '🚀 Deployed to GitHub Pages'
scripts.help:
cat << 'EOF'
🎙️ AINTERCOM Commands
=====================
npm run dev        - Start live-server (auto-reload)
npm run server     - Start HTTP server
npm run start      - Alias for dev
npm run build      - Static site (no build)
npm test           - Run tests
npm run format     - Format code
npm run extract-glossary - Extract 1000+ terms from modules/lexique.html
npm run deploy     - Push to GitHub Pages
EOF
